contentList.content: Call forth a veil of shadows and silence that gives you and all nearby companions a +10 bonus to Stealth <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Checks</LSTag> and +1 <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">AC</LSTag>.
This entity and nearby allies have a +10 bonus to Stealth <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Checks</LSTag> and +1 <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">AC</LSTag>.
Veiled by an ally. +10 bonus to Stealth <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Checks</LSTag> and +1 <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">AC</LSTag>.

Grant another creature <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Stealth">Stealth</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="SleightOfHand">Sleight Of Hand</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Deception">Deception</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Checks</LSTag>.

Has <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Stealth">Stealth</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="SleightOfHand">Sleight Of Hand</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Deception">Deception</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Checks</LSTag>.
